name: io.github.tiliondev/fortress
description: Stealth browser for AI agents: fetch pages behind Cloudflare/DataDome/CAPTCHA, extract clean data.

environmentVariables.name: TILION_MCP_PREWARM
environmentVariables.description: Boot the browser at startup so the first tool call is instant (default 1).

environmentVariables.name: TILION_MCP_HEADLESS
environmentVariables.description: Set 0 to show a visible browser window (default 1).

environmentVariables.name: TILION_ALLOW_PRIVATE_EGRESS
environmentVariables.description: Set 1 to allow tools to reach localhost / private IPs (SSRF guard off).

environmentVariables.name: TILION_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Run browsers on a hosted Tilion server instead of locally.

environmentVariables.name: TILION_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer key for the hosted Tilion server (cloud mode only).
